1 round
10 Scap Pull Ups
15 RDL Empty Bar
15 Bent Over Row Empty Bar
10 Banded Pallof Press
10 Glute Bridge @ 50% DL

strength.name: Deadlift
strength.description:
4x3 | * Shoulders to back pocket
* Crown to Ceiling
* Push the world away | E3MOM 18 mins
BUILD 3 sets
00:00 8 @ 50%
03:00 6 @ 60%
06:00 4 @ 70%
Hold 3 Sets
09:00 3 @ 80%
12:00 3 @ 80%
15:00 3 @ 80%

hypertrophy.reasoning: Deadlifts heavily tax posterior chain; accessory work targets antagonists and underdeveloped mirrors to prevent imbalance.
